body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Science. Grade level: Class IX. Session: Tissues - Session 2. Concept: Animal Tissues: The Body's Specialized Teams. Visual requirement: A labeled diagram showing the four types: Skin cross-section, bone with marrow, muscle fibers contracting, and a neuron. Style: textbook-friendly, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, white or light background, student-safe, no watermark. If labels are needed, keep them minimal and readable.
